name: @studio/transactional-email
description: Reusable transactional-email send seam. sendEmail(to, subject, html, {attachment}) validates the recipient server-side, builds a Resend payload (optional base64 attachment), and POSTs to the Resend REST API — fail-soft (returns a result, never throws). Backs both the in-app 'email me the report' action and the hosted 'email on done' n8n workflow node. Node-22 built-ins only; no SDK vendored; config via env (+ ~/.claude/transactional-email.env fallback); no secrets in files.
